home_content3_fragment_h3tag: MBT received the BSFZ seal of approval
home_content3_fragment_description_first: We are delighted to have been awarded the BSFZ seal as a company. This recognition confirms our ongoing efforts and investments in research and development. The BSFZ seal certifies the research and development activities of companies that have received at least one positive decision from the
home_content3_fragment_description_secon: It is a valuable confirmation of our innovative strength and our commitment to constantly developing new solutions.
